string.text:
The FAMAE SAF (Subametralladora Famae) is a 9mm submachine gun produced and manufactured in Chile by FAMAE (Fabricas y Maestranzas del Ejercito) since 1993.
 The SAF is a blowback-operated select-fire submachine gun, firing from a closed bolt. It is based on the Swiss SIG SG 540 assault rifle which was produced under license in Chile in the 1980s. The design is a shortened version of the SIG 540 rifle, but the rifle's rotating bolt has been replaced with a simple blowback bolt. The SAF also has a bolt hold-open catch that engages after the final shot. Otherwise, the receiver, stock, fore-end, trigger/hammer assembly and floating firing pin design are from the SIG 540. (It also retains the folding trigger guard for winter glove use.)
 
 The upper and lower receiver as well as the trigger guard are steel, and the pistol-grip and handguards are all made from polymer. The ambidextrous safety/fire selector switch, as well as the interchangeability with SIG 552/553 handguards are a feature found on the latest versions. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] no attachments
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] no sights.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] Using the spraygun paint you can recolor this weapon into a different color. (this will consume the spraygun paint item)

The FAMAE SAF (Subametralladora Famae) is a 9mm submachine gun produced and manufactured in Chile by FAMAE (Fabricas y Maestranzas del Ejercito) since 1993.
 The SAF is a blowback-operated select-fire submachine gun, firing from a closed bolt. It is based on the Swiss SIG SG 540 assault rifle which was produced under license in Chile in the 1980s. The design is a shortened version of the SIG 540 rifle, but the rifle's rotating bolt has been replaced with a simple blowback bolt. The SAF also has a bolt hold-open catch that engages after the final shot. Otherwise, the receiver, stock, fore-end, trigger/hammer assembly and floating firing pin design are from the SIG 540. (It also retains the folding trigger guard for winter glove use.)
 
 The upper and lower receiver as well as the trigger guard are steel, and the pistol-grip and handguards are all made from polymer. The ambidextrous safety/fire selector switch, as well as the interchangeability with SIG 552/553 handguards are a feature found on the latest versions. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] no attachments
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] no sights.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been painted using the spraygun paint. You can turn it back into its original color by using kerosene (this will consume the Kerosene item).

 Using the spraygun paint you can recolor this weapon into a different color. (this will consume the spraygun paint item)

Shiny!!!! Too bad it's permanent, ha ha. Yep, there's no way back, on the flipside, everybody will envy you.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] no attachments
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] no sights.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Special Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been upgraded to its special camo variant. This change is permanent, as are the increased weapon ratings, so there's that.

Well congrats, you did it, you found the secret camo. Too bad it's permanent, ha ha. Yep, there's no way back, on the flipside, you now have a cool Kryptek Obscura Nox camo.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] no attachments
 %c[d_purple] Tier 0 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] no sights.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Secret Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been upgraded to its secret camo variant. This change is permanent.

The FAMAE SAF (Subametralladora Famae) is a 9mm submachine gun produced and manufactured in Chile by FAMAE (Fabricas y Maestranzas del Ejercito) since 1993.
 The SAF is a blowback-operated select-fire submachine gun, firing from a closed bolt. It is based on the Swiss SIG SG 540 assault rifle which was produced under license in Chile in the 1980s. The design is a shortened version of the SIG 540 rifle, but the rifle's rotating bolt has been replaced with a simple blowback bolt. The SAF also has a bolt hold-open catch that engages after the final shot. Otherwise, the receiver, stock, fore-end, trigger/hammer assembly and floating firing pin design are from the SIG 540. (It also retains the folding trigger guard for winter glove use.)
 
 The upper and lower receiver as well as the trigger guard are steel, and the pistol-grip and handguards are all made from polymer. The ambidextrous safety/fire selector switch, as well as the interchangeability with SIG 552/553 handguards are a feature found on the latest versions. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] 9mm silencer
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] common western reddot sights (high profile) and battle sights (prismatic and low magnification scopes) and a permanently installed laser sight.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] Using the spraygun paint you can recolor this weapon into a different color. (this will consume the spraygun paint item)

The FAMAE SAF (Subametralladora Famae) is a 9mm submachine gun produced and manufactured in Chile by FAMAE (Fabricas y Maestranzas del Ejercito) since 1993.
 The SAF is a blowback-operated select-fire submachine gun, firing from a closed bolt. It is based on the Swiss SIG SG 540 assault rifle which was produced under license in Chile in the 1980s. The design is a shortened version of the SIG 540 rifle, but the rifle's rotating bolt has been replaced with a simple blowback bolt. The SAF also has a bolt hold-open catch that engages after the final shot. Otherwise, the receiver, stock, fore-end, trigger/hammer assembly and floating firing pin design are from the SIG 540. (It also retains the folding trigger guard for winter glove use.)
 
 The upper and lower receiver as well as the trigger guard are steel, and the pistol-grip and handguards are all made from polymer. The ambidextrous safety/fire selector switch, as well as the interchangeability with SIG 552/553 handguards are a feature found on the latest versions. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] 9mm silencer
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] common western reddot sights (high profile) and battle sights (prismatic and low magnification scopes) and a permanently installed laser sight.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been painted using the spraygun paint. You can turn it back into its original color by using kerosene (this will consume the Kerosene item).

 Using the spraygun paint you can recolor this weapon into a different color. (this will consume the spraygun paint item)

Well congrats, you did it, you found the secret camo. Too bad it's permanent, ha ha. Yep, there's no way back, on the flipside, you now have a cool Kryptek Obscura Nox camo.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] 9mm silencer
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] common western reddot sights (high profile) and battle sights (prismatic and low magnification scopes) and a permanently installed laser sight.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been upgraded to its secret camo variant. This change is permanent.

Shiny!!!! Too bad it's permanent, ha ha. Yep, there's no way back, on the flipside, everybody will envy you.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 attachments: %c[ui_gray_2] 9mm silencer
 %c[d_purple] Tier 2 sights: %c[ui_gray_2] common western reddot sights (high profile) and battle sights (prismatic and low magnification scopes) and a permanently installed laser sight.
 %c[ui_gray_2]REPAINT: 
 %c[d_purple] Camo Paint: %c[ui_gray_2] This weapon has been upgraded to its secret camo variant. This change is permanent.
